caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a striped button-down shirt and over-ear headphones, is speaking while looking toward the camera. She is positioned in an indoor setting with light-colored walls and pale yellow curtains draped to her left. In the background to her right, a neutral-toned surface, possibly a couch or ledge, is visible. Across the sequence, the woman maintains her position, and her mouth moves as she speaks, with her expression remaining relatively consistent. Small, white text that reads "Nancy Derry#" is visible in the bottom left corner of each shot. No other people, objects, or logos are present in the scene. The only change between the frames is the subtle movement of her lips and facial muscles as she talks.
